title: Hena` #2012
definition:
Hena = "troubling"

 1) a city in Mesopotamia which the Assyrian kings reduced shortly
    before the time of Sennacherib; site unknown
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hena = "troubling"

 1) a city in Mesopotamia which the Assyrian kings reduced shortly
    before the time of Sennacherib; site unknown

    NASB:  a city in Aram (Syria) or Mesopotamia
